Level Monitoring Systems

Chemical Liquid Level Indicator

Local, panel-mounted level indication for chemical tanks.

Buy on AmazonRequest a Quote

Industries

Chemical, Pharmaceutical

Deliverables

2 items included

◢ Overview

Product Overview

A rugged local indicator that displays liquid level for chemical storage tanks. Engineered for plant-floor readability and long service life.

◢ Key Features

What it does

  • Panel-mount LED display
  • Configurable alarm setpoints
  • Loop powered
  • Easy retrofit

◢ Technical Specifications

Specifications

Display4-digit LED
Input4–20 mA

◢ Applications

Where it's deployed

  • Chemical batch tanks
  • Process buffer tanks

◢ Industries Served

Designed for

ChemicalPharmaceutical

◢ Benefits

Why it matters

01

Immediate visibility

02

Low-cost retrofit

◢ Deliverables

What's included

  • Indicator unit
  • Mounting kit
